issues.detail: The skill does not fully handle error scenarios or edge cases such as API failures or invalid inputs.
The file contains extensive explanatory text that may be considered padded and not strictly necessary for execution.
The implementation is Python-specific and does not provide equivalent support for Node.js or other platforms.

scenarios.name: generate-photorealistic-product-image
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets almost all rubric requirements except printing file size, while Response B does not meet any of the specified DALL‑E requirements.

scenarios.name: edit-image-with-inpainting-mask
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets most rubric items but uses a different prompt string, whereas Response A does not use the required edit_image call at all.
